transactions.title: Secure Transaction Records
transactions.subtitle: Cryptographically signed authorization events — verifiable with RSA public keys
transactions.infoBannerPre: Transaction signatures are verified client-side using each user's RSA-2048 public key. A
transactions.infoBannerPost: result proves the JWT was signed by the private key of the recorded user and has not been modified. The private key is never transmitted to the server.
